feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Redox processes of slightly-carbon-rich rocky planets
entry.content:
Authors: CM Guimond, O Shorttle, R Pierrehumbert

Journal: 2026

Abstract: Whether a planet's volcanic gas is oxidising or reducing is inherited from redox conditions in the planet's mantle. It is often presumed that reactions between iron species control mantle oxygen fugacity. However, iron alone need not be the sole ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Raymond Pierrehumbert (author alert)

entry.title: A highly limited amino acid library from asteroid Bennu yields wide-ranging protein folds
entry.content:
Authors: S Bartlett, A Gupta, D Phung, JE Goldford, J Yang... - Nature Communications, 2026

Abstract: AI protein design software is used to explore the world of ancient protein structures, and very small, primordial amino acid libraries are found to produce a wide variety of key folds. Data from asteroid analyses and protobiotic chemistry experiments are ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Alert: Stuart Bartlett (author alert)

entry.title: Fracture geometry and topology and their spectral signatures at OxiaPlanum, Mars
entry.content:
Authors: M Rasmussen, F Altieri, A Frigeri, J Brossier, JT Ponce...

Journal: 2026

Abstract: The European Space Agency (ESA) Rosalind Franklin rover Mission (RFM) is expected to land at Oxia Planum, Mars in 2030. Orbital spectral data and imagery reveal layered, clay-rich sedimentary deposits, often overlain by or interbedded with ...

Alert: Douglas Jerolmack (author alert)
